<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Why does this matter?
     e.g. "When viewing a failed job there is no way to retry it without navigating away." -->

<!-- Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any other approaches or workarounds? Why do you prefer your proposal? -->
